plugin_desc: Barracuda CloudGen Firewall / Web Filter SNMP child template for devices under enterprise PEN 20632. The shared Firewall SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. This child template adds verified bspyware system leaves for CPU/system temperature and firmware/log storage utilization. CPU, memory and fan/power-supply states are not promoted because stable shared state leaves are not confirmed; fan RPM and trap-only dead-fan signals are kept out of shared device health.
name: Firewall

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Barracuda CPU and system temperature readings, reported as the highest temperature per firewall instance.

metrics.name: device_disk_usage
metrics.description: Barracuda firmware and log storage utilization, reported as the highest utilization per firewall instance.
